hero.title: Jura Champi
hero.subtitle: Fresh mushroom producer in the Jura region

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Jura Champi is a small artisan farm where we grow our mushrooms in accordance with organic farming and strive to preserve the nature and environment around us. Located in the small village of Collonges, on the edge of the Jura. Our small farm is in the Ain department, close to the Swiss border.
story.learnMore: Discover our story and where to find us →

clients.title: Who are our mushrooms for?
clients.intro: Our mushrooms are for restaurateurs, caterers, communities, organic food stores and other businesses. Individuals can also be delivered directly to their homes.
clients.restaurantsDesc: Fresh, quality products to enhance your dishes
clients.canteensDesc: Regular supplies for local, healthy meals
clients.individualsDesc: Home delivery for your everyday recipes

productsPreview.title: Discover our selection of fresh mushrooms grown at the foot of the Jura
productsPreview.subtitle: Choose our mushrooms

products.title: Our Mushrooms
products.subtitle: Fresh mushrooms grown with passion at the foot of the Jura

pleuroteBlanche.name: White Oyster Mushroom
pleuroteBlanche.description: The white oyster mushroom offers a delicate texture and subtle, mild flavor. Ideal pan-fried, in sauce or in risottos.

pleurotePanicaut.name: Pleurotus eryngii
pleurotePanicaut.description: Pleurotus eryngii stands out for its firm flesh and pronounced flavor. Excellent grilled or as an accompaniment to meats.

blackPearl.name: Black Pearl
blackPearl.description: Black Pearl is a mushroom with a dark cap and meaty texture. Its intense flavor makes it a choice ingredient for hearty dishes.

shiitake.name: Shiitake
shiitake.description: Shiitake, originally from Asia, is prized for its firm flesh and pronounced umami flavor. Perfect for stir-fries, soups and Asian dishes.

criniereLion.name: Lion's Mane
criniereLion.description: Also called 'beard of Saturn', lion's mane offers a unique filamentous texture and delicate notes. Delicious pan-fried or in broth.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, an order? Don't hesitate to contact us.

info.title: Our contact details
info.addressValue: 250, rue de l'Etournelle Techno Parc de Collonges, 01550 Collonges
info.hoursValue: Monday to Friday — 9am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm

findUs.title: Find us
findUs.subtitle: Our story, our premises and where to find us

history.title: Our story
history.paragraph1: Jura Champi is a small artisan farm where we grow our mushrooms in accordance with organic farming and strive to preserve the nature and environment around us. Located in the small village of Collonges, on the edge of the Jura. Our small farm is in the Ain department, close to the Swiss border.

premises.title: Our premises
premises.description: Our farm is located in Collonges along the Jura. Our mushrooms are grown in accordance with organic farming.
premises.address: 250, rue de l'Etournelle Techno Parc de Collonges, 01550 Collonges

online.title: Online & by phone
online.description: Order or ask your questions by email or phone. We're happy to respond and organize deliveries according to your needs.

markets.title: At markets
markets.description: Come say hello and taste our mushrooms at local producer markets. A chance to chat, discover our latest products and leave with a full basket!

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.intro: In accordance with the provisions of articles 6-III and 19 of Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on Confidence in the Digital Economy (L.C.E.N.), these legal notices apply to the jurachampi.fr website.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Jura Champi is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

cgv.title: Terms and conditions of sale
cgv.intro: These general terms and conditions of sale govern the sale of fresh mushrooms by Jura Champi to professionals and individuals.
